'''Gilflyn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who became a corrupt and psychotic [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who lived on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] at the time of the founding of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
Having concluded that the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side of the Force]] had tipped the balance by growing too much stronger than the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], he saw it as his duty to hunt and destroy the heroes and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], preferably when they were young and still inexperienced. Trusting in his power of foresight, he lurked about [[Treasure Ship Row/Legends|Treasure Ship Row]] and other likely places, looking to strike down and destroy the next [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] or [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] before they gained prominence. He owned a [[YZ-775 medium transport|YZ-775]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] named the ''[[Mutilator]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
Described as "in his late twenties" shortly after the establishment of the New Republic, it is impossible that Gilflyn existed at the time of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]. He may have been self-taught, without a [[Jedi Master/Legends|master]].
